# seerr_discover (Data Source)

Read Seerr discovery results via `/api/v1/discover/movies` or `/api/v1/discover/tv`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_discover" "movies" {
  media_type   = "movie"
  sort_by      = "popularity.desc"
  watch_region = "US"
  page         = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `media_type` (String) Discovery media type: `movie` or `tv`.

### Optional

- `genre` (String)
- `keywords` (String)
- `language` (String)
- `page` (Number)
- `sort_by` (String)
- `watch_region` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `response_json` (String)
- `results_json` (String)
